div.h1: System V AMD64 ABI Stack Frame Layout

g.text: rbp+8 | Return Address | pushed by CALL

div.p: Before CALL: rsp % 16 == 0 After CALL: rsp % 16 == 8 (return address pushed) After push rbp: rsp % 16 == 0 After N pushes:
Arguments 1-6: passed in registers (rdi, rsi, rdx, rcx, r8, r9) Arguments 7+: pushed right-to-left

ul.li: Arg 8 at rbp + 24 Caller cleans up stack args.
